manifest.name: Bible Verse Tips

name: Bible Verse Tips

releases.author: joelwongjy
releases.description:
First release of **Bible Verse Tips**.

- Hover (desktop) or tap (mobile) any Bible reference to preview the verse, in Reading view and Live Preview.
- Click a reference to open the whole chapter in a built-in reader with chapter navigation.
- Inline translation switcher: NIV, NLT, ESV, NKJV, NASB, AMP, MSG, NET, KJV, WEB and many more.

### Manual install
Copy `main.js`, `manifest.json` and `styles.css` into
`<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/bible-verse-tips/`, then enable the plugin in
Settings → Community plugins.
